service.name: Wolfram Alpha API
service.description_for_ai: Computational knowledge engine. Answers math, science, geography, history, statistics questions with step-by-step solutions. Solves equations, computes integrals, converts units, plots functions. Use for math homework, scientific calculations, factual queries.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Answer any factual or computational query with step-by-step results. Math equations, unit conversions, science facts, statistics, geographic data.

input.description: Natural language query e.g. integrate x^2 dx, distance from Moscow to Beijing, derivative of sin(x)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get a simple one-line answer to a factual question. Faster and cheaper than full query.

i.description: Simple query e.g. speed of light, capital of France, 2+2
